title: Metric Recommendation v1
description: Recommended and forbidden metric ranges for an objectKind + tier pair.

recommendedMin.description: Lower bound of the recommended band (inclusive).

recommendedMax.description: Upper bound of the recommended band (inclusive).

forbiddenMin.description: Lower bound of the forbidden band (optional).

forbiddenMax.description: Upper bound of the forbidden band (optional).

policy.description: Policy for handling out-of-range values in CHATDIRECTOR and CI.

outOfRangeMode.description: Default handling when proposed metric values fall outside recommended bands.

forbiddenMode.description: Handling when proposed values intersect forbidden bands.
